news.headline: Bill Abbott discusses future of values-driven entertainment at NRB 2025 convention in Texas. CEO of Great American Media.
news.summary: In Grapevine, Texas on Feb. 28, 2025, Bill Abbott, President & CEO of Great American Media, participated in the NRB 2025 International Christian Media Convention as a panelist in the Vision for the Future of Values-Driven Media forum. Abbott was among industry leaders discussing key topics at the event, which attracted a large audience and featured various sessions on the importance of values-based media in the modern landscape.

South Korea February trade shifts to surplus of $4.300 billion; estimated at +$4.841 billion

Roughly 7,000 workers to be cut by Social Security Administration as they restructure and close six regional offices.
news.summary: The organization is undergoing changes by reorganizing and shutting down six regional offices that offer coordination and assistance to employees who cater to beneficiaries.

news.headline: Zelensky indicates Ukraine is prepared for minerals deal following dispute with Trump in Oval Office.
i-80 Gold completes steps for recapitalization plan: convertible debenture indenture amended, private placement closed.
news.summary: Update on the amendments to the convertible debenture indenture and conclusion of the concurrent private placement have been finalized. This release serves as a "designated news release" related to the Company's prospectus supplement dated August 12, 2024, concerning its short form base shelf offering.

news.headline: Brookfield Renewable files 2024 annual reports with financial statements for year ended Dec. 31. NYSE: BEP, BEPC; TSX: BEP.UN, BEPC.
news.summary: Today, on February 28, 2025, Brookfield Renewable (NYSE: BEP, BEPC; TSX: BEP.UN, BEPC) released its 2024 annual reports, which comprise audited financial statements for the period ending December 31, 2024. The reports were officially filed on Forms 20-F with the SEC on EDGAR and with Canadian securities regulatory authorities on SEDAR+.

news.headline: TWFG reports unaudited preliminary financial results for Q4 & 2024, subject to change.Actual results may differ.
news.summary: TWFG, Inc. ("TWFG" or "the Company") a high-growth insurance distribution company, shared preliminary unaudited financial highlights for Q4 and full year of 2024, as of Dec 31. The results are subject to change as finalization is underway. The estimates are based on available information and actual results may vary due to closing procedures and new developments. TWFG is listed on NASDAQ under TWFG.

news.headline: Our Rescue partners with Shakti Samuha to open shelter in Nepal for sex trafficking survivors. Help to fund this critical initiative.
news.summary: Supporters are welcomed to aid in financing a crucial housing and survivor care program. Our Rescue, an international NGO focused on combating sex trafficking and child exploitation, has joined forces with partners. The initiative aims to provide assistance to survivors and is seeking funding from anti-trafficking allies. This announcement was made in Minneapolis on Feb. 28, 2025.

news.headline: Larry Summers and Scott Bessent discuss US support for Ukraine changes on Bloomberg.
news.summary: In a recent report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.5%, marking an increase of 1.2% from the previous quarter. This translates to a total of 2.3 million people currently unemployed. The report also highlights a decrease in job vacancies by 15% compared to last year. Furthermore, the youth unemployment rate has reached a concerning 12.8%. Experts attribute these economic challenges to the ongoing pandemic and subsequent restrictions that have significantly impacted various industries. The government is urged to take immediate action to address this growing issue and provide support to those affected.

news.headline: Digital Media Solutions, Inc. has been sold to an investor group, offering a strong financial base for growth. (Words: 26)
news.summary: Digital Media Solutions, Inc. (DMS) has announced on February 28, 2025, that the company is moving ahead with a reinforced financial footing, making it well-prepared to take advantage of substantial growth prospects. Based in Clearwater, Florida, DMS, a top player in technology-driven digital performance services, is geared towards leveraging this strengthened foundation to drive its growth strategies. This development indicates that DMS is confident about seizing opportunities in the digital performance sector.

news.headline: US Treasury yields drop below 4% as inflation eases, sparking rally in the market.
Atomic and Bluevine have merged, creating a new partnership in the financial sector.
Dow Jones up, other indexes down due to Trump tariff talk. Cathie Wood buys stock amid 39% dive. Warren Buffett stock enters. Palantir plunges.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones experienced an increase on the stock market. A stock associated with Warren Buffett made a successful entry. Cathie Wood purchased a plummeting stock, while Palantir witnessed a decline. This news was covered in a post titled "Stock Market Today: Dow Jones Up, Other Indexes Fall On Trump Tariff Talk; Cathie Wood Loads Up On This Stock Amid 39% Dive" and was provided by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Nvidia's stock rises on strong earnings and high Blackwell demand, impacting Dow Jones Futures with key movers Salesforce and Snowflake.
news.summary: A leading AI chip company experienced a decline in stocks in the latest trading session. Significant movements were seen in the earnings reports of Salesforce and Snowflake. Nvidia's stock saw an increase due to impressive earnings and high demand for the Blackwell model. This update comes from a recent article on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Stock market rally begins after losses by Tesla, Nvidia, and Palantir. Investors advised on next steps.
news.summary: Following significant losses from Tesla, Nvidia, and Palantir, a stock market rally is now in progress. The Dow Jones Futures are showing signs of improvement as investors strategize their next moves. This development comes after a challenging period for the market, with key players experiencing notable declines. Traders and stakeholders are advised to monitor the evolving situation closely, considering potential opportunities that may arise amidst the ongoing rally. Stay informed and be prepared to act accordingly in response to the changing market dynamics.

news.headline: Ahn, Lutnick agree on working groups for tariffs, shipbuilding
South Korea Trade Ministry Comments in Statement
South Korea trade chief Ahn meets with US Commerce Secretary Lutnick
Slow market week ends with sharp Friday sell-off due to economic fears. NVIDIA earnings report on Wednesday is key focus. $NVDA down 17% in past session on China's DeepSeek model.
news.summary: Following a sluggish week, the market is gearing up for a potentially eventful one. Stock prices rose steadily until Friday when they plummeted, influenced by a dip in consumer confidence and concerns over economic slowdown triggered by tariffs and the influence of DOGE. All eyes are now on NVIDIA as they are scheduled to announce their earnings after trading on Wednesday. Investors are keen not only on the financial numbers, but also on the guidance and the outlook of CEO Jensen Huang. Earlier this year, the unveiling of China's DeepSeek model caused a tech sell-off, leading to a 17% drop in Nvidia’s value in just one day. While the company has since regained stability, uncertainties linger regarding the lasting effects on AI chip technology.

news.headline: Teranet plans to redeem 3.544% Series 2020-1 bonds after closing $550 million senior secured bond offering.
news.summary: This information should not be shared with U.S. newswire services or circulated within the United States. It is intended solely for the appropriate audience and jurisdiction.

news.headline: Safe Bulkers, Inc. authorizes a 3 million shares repurchase program - 2.8% of common stock & 5.4% of public float.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Monaco on Feb. 24, 2025, Safe Bulkers, Inc. disclosed its authorization of a new program allowing for the potential purchase of up to 3,000,000 shares of its common stock. This initiative, if fully executed, would account for approximately 2.8% of the total outstanding shares of the company's common stock and 5.4% of its public float. It is noted that this program replaces any existing repurchase programs previously in place for the Company. Safe Bulkers, Inc., recognized for its global marine drybulk transportation services, operates under the ticker symbol NYSE: SB.

news.headline: Trump and Zelensky's dispute in the Oval Office caused the breakdown of a deal. #news #Trump #Zelensky
Criminals are using generative AI to enhance fake IDs for fraud, source reveals  - report.
Majors Management acquires Chevron-branded fuel supply contracts from Bluebonnet Petroleum.
news.summary: A recent transaction in Lawrenceville, Ga. on Feb. 28, 2025, saw Majors Management, LLC and its affiliates successfully acquire the retail fuel supply contracts of Chevron-branded stations from Bluebonnet Petroleum, Inc. The deal marks a significant move for Majors, solidifying their position in the industry. Specific numbers regarding the acquisition were not provided.

news.headline: Tesla stock hovering near key support levels after significant post-election gains nearly reversed. Company managed to maintain crucial support amid sell-off.
news.summary: Following a significant post-election surge, Tesla stock is now nearing a complete reversal, as key levels have been breached in a major sell-off. The electric vehicle company has managed to retain crucial support levels as its stock price fluctuates. This development comes after Tesla experienced substantial gains following the recent elections.

news.headline: Wag'n Tails CEO Dennis Gnetz, a mobile pet care industry pioneer since 1971, retires on Feb. 28, 2025.
news.summary: In Granger, Indiana, on February 28, 2025, Wag'n Tails, a prominent player in the mobile pet care sector since 1971, revealed that Dennis Gnetz, a key figure in shaping the mobile pet grooming field, will be stepping down from his role as Chief Executive Officer on the same day. Gnetz has played a significant role in the industry for several decades and his retirement marks a significant transition for the company as it moves forward.

news.headline: CCA Industries, Inc. reported a net loss of $6,119,738 for the year ended November 30, 2024.
news.summary: Fort Washington-based company, CCA Industries, Inc. (OTC: "CAWW"), disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal year ending on November 30, 2024. The company reported a significant net loss of $6,119,738 for that period. This figure represents a notable decrease compared to the net loss recorded in the previous fiscal year. The detailed financial results can be referenced in the provided chart.

news.headline: Gov. DeSantis allocates $2 million from Florida Cancer Innovation Fund to expand FIU's personalized cancer treatment technology.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, Gov. Ron DeSantis revealed that $2 million in funding from the Casey DeSantis Florida Cancer Innovation Fund will be allocated to enhance patient accessibility to the innovative functional precision medicine treatment approach developed by FIU cancer researcher Diana Azzam.

news.headline: 1 in 3 worldwide at risk for heart rhythm disorder; awareness low, urgent action needed - European Heart Rhythm Association.
news.summary: Recent data from cardiologists in Europe reveals that 33.3% of the global population is at risk of experiencing a dangerous heart rhythm disorder at some point in their lives. Despite the increasing number of cases, there is a significant lack of awareness surrounding this issue. This highlights the pressing need for greater education and preventive measures to address the growing problem.

news.headline: Global Uranium Corp extends marketing program with Euro Digital Media Ltd for another 30 days, starting March 3, 2025.
news.summary: Canadian company Global Uranium Corp. has extended its engagement with Euro Digital Media Ltd. for marketing services. This extension, announced on Feb. 28, 2025, follows previous releases on Nov. 7, 2024, Dec. 17, 2024, and Jan. 10, 2025. The agreement, located at 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, UK, WC2H 9JQ, and email info@eurodigitalmedia.co.uk, is set for an additional 30 days from March 3, 2025, or until budget depletion. Management retains the authority to adjust the duration of the marketing services. Global Uranium Corp. is listed under CSE: GURN, OTC: GURFF, FRA: Q3J.

news.headline: North American Construction Group has completed the redemption of its 5.5% Convertible Debentures due June 30, 2028.
news.summary: North American Construction Group Ltd. (NACG) based in Acheson, Alberta, shared the successful redemption of its 5.5% Convertible Debentures on February 28, 2025. The company completed the redemption of the Debentures, which were due on June 30, 2028, on the specified Redemption Date. This move signifies a significant financial milestone for NACG.

news.headline: HUMBL and NUBURU ink $2M share exchange deal, partnership to boost growth and shareholder value.
news.summary: In San Diego, California, on February 28, 2025, HUMBL, Inc. (OTC: HMBL) revealed a $2,000,000 Equity Swap Agreement alongside a strategic alliance with NUBURU, Inc. (NYSE: BURU). The collaboration aims to enhance the growth plans of both entities and provide prompt benefits to stakeholders.

news.headline: Carmit Bachar to headline 13th Annual Ski & Smile Challenge in Park City, Utah by Operation Smile.
news.summary: In Park City, Utah on February 28, 2025, the renowned global nonprofit Operation Smile, which offers cleft surgery and comprehensive care to those in need, is excited to reveal the comeback of its eagerly awaited 13th Annual Operation Smile Ski & Smile Challenge.

news.headline: Spending dips as consumers cut back, but there's a positive sign amidst it all.
"ELS (NYSE: ELS) to attend Citi 2025 Global Property CEO Conference, featuring executive team members."
news.summary: Equity LifeStyle Properties, Inc. (NYSE: ELS) recently disclosed their participation in the upcoming Citi 2025 Global Property CEO Conference. Scheduled for February 28, 2025, in Chicago, key executives from the company, including the President, will be present at the conference. This announcement was made by ELS, a prominent player in the real estate sector, known for their strategic investments and portfolio management. The conference aims to bring together industry leaders and investors to discuss emerging trends and opportunities in the global property market. This participation highlights ELS's commitment to networking and staying abreast of market developments.

news.headline: NJCC donates $50,000 to 5 cities for Black History Month, supporting initiatives for transformative change.
news.summary: Today in New Brunswick, New Jersey, top officials in local communities have selected nonprofit organizations to receive awards from the leading CDFI. These awards are aimed at supporting initiatives that are driving significant change in their respective areas. The awards are set to benefit these nonprofits in executing projects that are making a transformative impact. This initiative is led by New Jersey Community Capital, a prominent national community development financial institution. The recognition was announced on February 28, 2025.

news.headline: Chicago Faucets hosts webinar on plumbing design and waterborne infection risks in buildings on March 12, 2025. Time: 11 AM CST.
news.summary: A company based in Des Plaines, Illinois, Chicago Faucets, is hosting a webinar titled "Plumbing Design: Strategies for Reducing Waterborne Infections in the Modern Era of Water Management" on March 12, 2025, at 11 AM Central Standard Time. The webinar aims to assist industry professionals in understanding and implementing measures to minimize waterborne infections.

news.headline: Russia celebrates Zelenskiy's humiliation in Oval Office.
National Press Club President denounces Vietnam's sentencing of journalist Truong Huy San to 30 months in prison.
news.summary: In a statement today, National Press Club President Mike Balsamo expressed concern over the sentencing of Vietnamese journalist Truong Huy San to 30 months in prison. Balsamo called this act an assault on press freedom, highlighting the importance of journalists being able to speak truthfully.

news.headline: DJ Spinderella joins AHF for Florida AIDS Walk 20th Anniversary at Fort Lauderdale Beach on March 15th.
news.summary: Celebrated hip hop DJ and rapper DJ Spinderella from Salt-N-Pepa fame is set to perform at the upcoming Florida AIDS Walk & Music Festival in Fort Lauderdale. The event, marking AIDS Healthcare Foundation's 20th year celebration, will take place on March 15th at Fort Lauderdale Beach. DJ Spinderella recently opened for Ricky Martin at AHF's World AIDS Day Concert in Miami, drawing significant attention. This annual event by AHF aims to raise awareness and funds to combat AIDS, with a special focus on the Florida region.

news.headline: BlackRock adds Bitcoin fund to portfolios, world's largest asset manager includes ETF in some portfolios.
news.summary: The world's largest asset manager, BlackRock, has decided to include its Bitcoin Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) in a small portion of its Target Allocation portfolios that focus on alternative investments.

news.headline: First Savings Financial Group, Inc. declares $0.16 quarterly dividend per common share to stockholders by March 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Jeffersonville, Indiana on February 28, 2025, First Savings Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSFG), the parent company of First Savings Bank, stated that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.16 per common share. This dividend is set to be distributed around March 31, 2025, to shareholders listed on the records as of March 14, 2025.

news.headline: Perma-Pipe International Holdings appoints Jon C. Biro, 58, to Board of Directors effective March 4, 2025. Business leadership experience.
news.summary: Perma-Pipe International Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: PPIH) located in Spring, Texas, shared news about modifications to its Board of Directors. On March 4, 2025, Mr. Jon C. Biro, aged 58, was appointed to the Board, bringing with him vast expertise in business leadership, finance, and executive roles. He currently serves as an Operating Advisor at Snow Peak Capital, LLC since 2022 and holds a board position at Sandy Alexander, Inc., a commercial company within the Snow Peak Capital, LLC portfolio.

news.headline: Saul Centers, Inc. (NYSE: BFS) reports Q4 2024 revenue of $67.9M, up from $66.7M. Full details in the article.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland, on February 28, 2025, Saul Centers, Inc. (NYSE: BFS), a real estate investment trust (REIT), shared its quarterly performance for the period ending on December 31, 2024. The company reported a rise in total revenue to $67.9 million compared to the previous quarter's $66.7 million.
